payload.answer: This looks additive: the new preference can be stored alongside the existing one without replacing it.
repair_options: add_new: Add that Sam from Goldman also likes Sonny Rollins as a separate preference.
keep_existing: Keep only the existing memory that Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
edit: Revise the preference wording before saving, such as combining both artists into one clarified statement.
cancel: Do not make any changes.
